title: AI Engineering Platform — Session Self-Awareness
description: The current AI session's self-awareness. Captures the session's id, type, scope, last action, current understanding, and intended next action. Updated at the start and end of every session. A future tool (or the platform itself) reads this file to know what the current session is doing.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier (e.g. UUID or human-readable slug like 'm0.5-architecture-refinement')

out_of_scope.description: What this session is explicitly NOT doing

current_understanding.description: What the session believes about the project right now.

last_action.description: The most recent action this session took.

target.description: Path or identifier of the action's target

intended_next_action.description: The single most concrete next thing the session will do (per Rule 17 in AGENTS.md: tests, implementation report, project state updates, Git commit).

session_notes.description: Free-form notes the session wants to leave for itself or the next session.
